emails.subject: RE: Peoples Cash Flow 1-22-02 - Russell.xls
emails.body: RE: Peoples Cash Flow 1-22-02 Russell.xls His list does not include any of the transport positions. It also includes some deals with the Chicago office that should not be included in the deal value. DG To: Giron, Darron C.

emails.subject: RE: Peoples Cash Flow 1-22-02 - Russell.xls
emails.body: thanks it all makes sense!! Scary Deirdre To: McCaffrey, Deirdre

emails.subject: RE: Peoples Cash Flow 1-22-02 - Russell.xls
emails.body: Darron if it's not too much trouble could we get the supply deal valued as of 1/16/01. That's the date the other deals were valued from. If not can I see the Nymex curve and just estimate the value differential from the 16th to yesterday. Thanks Deirdre 39685 To: McCaffrey, Deirdre
